description: After a long trip even through Chemnitz, arrives in the Dobruja. In a former German village whose inhabitants have been resettled; Romanians from Macedonia are coming in. Mild spring weather.
South of the Danube mouth. Preparation for the next move: inoculations, tropical-fitness examination, lecture by the unit doctor. Checkers tournaments for eggs. Very bleak.

Arrived after travel via Silistra, Shumen and the 1100 m Vribiga/Varbitsa Pass. Billeted with a 90-year-old woman, the best quarters of the war. Heroes' Memorial Day with parade, Bulgarian church service.
Suddenly leaves Kotel, heartfelt farewell. Wonderful drive on partly breakneck roads through mountains, very hot and dusty in the Maritsa Valley.

place: Bulgarian border / from Sofia to NW
description: Beginning of the attack on Yugoslavia. From Sofia northwest on the march into Yugoslavia. To this day Wilhelm has not fired a shot.
First day in Yugoslavia, supporting the infantry off the main advance route. Hideous weather with rain and snow, winter gear is brought back out.
Reached the Danube near Belgrade very quickly. Then a march back to the SW, destination unclear.
Location changed again. Orderly room in a sugar factory; real summer, lilacs in bloom. Vehicles are being painted for the long trip back to Germany.
The big southeastern journey at an end, moves into a large new barracks. No leave permitted, patrol duty, smoking ban. Marianne visits for a weekend despite trouble with the officer on duty.
